## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Be specific — describe the scenario, the limitation you hit, and why existing features don't address it.

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you'd like to see. If you have a specific API or CLI design in mind, include examples.

```python
# Example of how the new feature might be used
```

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why did you reject them?

## Who benefits

- [ ] End users (developers integrating CapFence)
- [ ] Security auditors / compliance teams
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline operators
- [ ] CapFence maintainers
- [ ] Other (specify)

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or related issues.
